creator: albert.kinderman@csun.edu
text:
I have a new install of a 4.2-Stable system with XFree-4.0.2_5

The description of wrapper states that it is for XFree86 4 and that you should not install it if you have XFree86 3. 

However, pkg_add fails on my system because of an unmet dependency on 
XFree86-3.3.6_6

The +CONTENTS file shows the @pkgdep on 3.3.6_6

If the package is only for XFree 4, it shouldn't depend on 3.3.6

Fix: 

change dependency
How-To-Repeat: Try to install wrapper on a system with XFree86 4 and not XFree86 3
